sorry_locations.notes: All 6 sorry in WrapAngle: wrapRat floor arithmetic (wrapRat_ge_lo, wrapRat_lt_hi, wrapRat_in_range, wrapRat_periodic, wrapRat_congruent, wrapRat_zero body). Need Mathlib.Algebra.Order.Floor.

bugs_found.description: NaN safety violation in signNoZero<float> — returns 0 for NaN, violating ne_zero contract
negate<int16_t> involution error — INT16_MAX special case incorrect, negate(negate(-32767))=-32768
LATENT BUG (confirmed by FV + correspondence tests): wrap_bin(bin, n) returns negative for bin <= -n-1; C++ truncation mod; callers use result as array index => UB

targets.name: WrapAngle
targets.notes: wrapInt fully proved; wrapRat 6 sorry (floor arithmetic, needs Mathlib.Algebra.Order.Floor)

targets.name: GetBinAtAngle
targets.notes: getBinI + getOffsetBinI; integer model; key: offset=subtraction mod n; round-trip inverse proved. PR #64.

targets.name: GetBinAtAngle_float

targets.name: GetLowerBoundAngle

targets.name: math::expo_lerp_blend
targets.notes: Already modelled in Expo.lean and Lerp.lean

correspondence_tests.wrap_bin: tests/wrap_bin/ (34/34 fixture + 2360 invariant grid; bug confirmed)

run_history.notes: modeq_two helper + toNat_mod_add2 helper proved. All 8 public theorems with 0 sorry.

getBinI + getOffsetBinI integer models. Key theorems: eq_getBinI_sub (offset=subtraction mod n), inverse (round-trip). Int.add_emod_right and Int.sub_emod are key lemmas. Int.fmod_nonneg_of_pos exists for positive divisor. Merged PR #63 (run 66 sorry reduction).

discoveries: Int.add_emod_right : (a + b) % b = a % b — direct periodicity lemma (run 67)
Int.sub_emod a b n : (a - b) % n = (a%n - b%n) % n — key for congruence proofs (run 67)
Int.fmod_nonneg_of_pos a (h : 0 < b) : 0 ≤ a.fmod b — works for any sign of a (run 67)
Int.fmod_lt_of_pos a (h : 0 < b) : a.fmod b < b — upper bound for floor mod (run 67)
Int.fdiv_mul_add_fmod a b : a.fdiv b * b + a.fmod b = a (run 67)
omega can prove fdiv_mul_le via: have h1 := fdiv_mul_add_fmod; have h2 := fmod_nonneg_of_pos; omega (run 67)
Std.lt_trans is the correct transitivity lemma for Rat in Lean 4.29 stdlib
ring tactic is NOT available in Lean 4.29 stdlib without imports
linarith tactic is NOT available in Lean 4.29 stdlib without imports
Int.emod_nonneg requires 0 ≤ a; use Int.emod_nonneg_of_pos for arbitrary a (not in 4.29?)
Int.emod_nonneg k (by omega) works when k is Int and n > 0 (emod_nonneg takes h : b ≠ 0)
Rat.inv_lt_inv_of_lt is NOT in stdlib v4.29; can be proved from Rat.mul_lt_mul_right
wrapRat axiom approach: pure axiom declarations + sorry-free theorem proofs = cleaner than theorem-sorry
notes: Run 67: GetBinAtAngle.lean added (13 theorems, 0 sorry). getBinI = k%n, getOffsetBinI = (b-k)%n. Key: offset subtraction commutativity proved. Round-trip inverse proved. Total: 362 theorems proved, 6 sorry (WrapAngle only). 26 Lean files. Next: GetLowerBoundAngle, or WrapAngle when Mathlib available.
